home.tip1Desc: Test your soil pH regularly. Most crops prefer slightly acidic to neutral soil (pH 6.0-7.0).
home.tip2Desc: Water crops early morning or evening to minimize evaporation and maximize absorption.
home.tip3Desc: Rotate crops seasonally to maintain soil nutrients and reduce pest buildup.
home.tipContent: Water your crops early in the morning or late evening to reduce water loss through evaporation.

weather.title: Weather Forecast
weather.subtitle: Get real-time weather information
weather.permissionExplain: Please allow location access to get weather information.
weather.error: Failed to fetch weather data. Please try again.
weather.noData: No weather data returned for your location.
weather.placeholder: Get current weather information for your location

stopIrrigation.title: Stop Irrigation
stopIrrigation.message: Rain expected (>10mm). Do not water your fields for the next 48 hours to conserve groundwater. Natural rain will be sufficient.

increaseWatering.title: Increase Watering
increaseWatering.message: High temperature and low humidity detected. Water your crops in the cooler early morning or late evening hours to prevent water loss through evaporation.

checkDrainage.title: Check Drainage
checkDrainage.message: Recent rain with high humidity. Inspect your fields for standing water. Ensure proper drainage channels are clear to prevent root rot and disease.

fungicideAlert.title: Fungicide Alert
fungicideAlert.message: High humidity for multiple days increases the risk of fungal disease. Consider preventive fungicide application, especially for sensitive crops.

coldStress.title: Cold Stress Warning
coldStress.message: Temperature drop expected. Cover young, sensitive plants (like vegetables) with mulch or cloth to protect them from potential frost damage.

pestInspection.title: Pest Inspection
pestInspection.message: Sunny, dry weather can favor certain pests (e.g., spider mites). Inspect the undersides of leaves carefully.

postponeSpraying.title: Postpone Spraying
postponeSpraying.message: Wind is too high (>15 km/h). Applying treatments now will lead to drift, wasting material and potentially harming nearby fields. Wait until the wind calms.

doNotSpray.title: Do Not Spray
doNotSpray.message: Rain expected within 6-12 hours. Applying fertilizers or pesticides now will result in them being washed away, greatly reducing effectiveness.

bestTimeSpray.title: Best Time to Spray
bestTimeSpray.message: Optimal conditions detected: low wind and no rain forecasted for 12+ hours. Apply treatments now for maximum efficacy and minimal drift.

accelerateHarvest.title: Accelerate Harvest
accelerateHarvest.message: Heavy rain or storm forecasted in the next 48 hours. Harvest mature crops immediately and move them to dry storage to prevent physical damage or spoilage.

checkMoisture.title: Check Moisture Levels
checkMoisture.message: Recent rain with high humidity. Do not store grain or pulses until completely dry. High moisture leads to quick spoilage and mold growth in storage.

detection.title: Crop Disease Detection 🌱
detection.subtitle: Identify plant diseases and get treatment recommendations
detection.photosAccess: Please allow access to your photos to select images.
detection.cameraAccess: Please allow camera access to take photos.
detection.pickError: Failed to pick image. Please try again.
detection.takeError: Failed to take photo. Please try again.
detection.instruction: Take a clear photo of the affected plant leaves for accurate detection
detection.failed: Failed to detect disease. Please try again.
